company.name: Google (Tel Aviv)
company.notes: Large R&D office. DeepMind presence locally. Creative AI work. 3 LinkedIn contacts.

research.status_summary: Actively hiring across 90–500+ open Israel roles (Tel Aviv + Haifa) as of June 2026, with no Israel-specific layoffs reported in 2026 — global Google layoffs (~1,500–3,000 cuts worldwide) have been U.S.-centric and focused on Android/Chrome/Pixel restructuring, not the Israel R&D org.
research.hiring_policy: Roles are predominantly on-site (Tel Aviv-Yafo / Haifa District) with some hybrid options; Google Israel does not sponsor visas for external candidates in its standard R&D hiring and is not EOR-friendly — candidates must have Israeli work authorization, as all postings require local presence.
recent_news: Google & Tel Aviv University launched a new 3-year, $1M AI research program (Dec 2025–2028) covering language models, AI privacy, algorithmic efficiency, GenAI evaluation, and climate AI — with Google PhD fellowships and free AI Pro access for Israeli students.

Google DeepMind confirmed Tel Aviv as one of its 9 major global research outposts (alongside London, Mountain View, Zurich, Paris, Tokyo, Toronto, Bangalore, Seattle) as of 2026, with the Israel site contributing to Gemini, AlphaFold-adjacent, and general-purpose AI work.

Google I/O 2026 (late May) showcased Gemini 3.5 Flash, Veo video generation, and real-time audio models — product lines that align with DeepMind's Tel Aviv creative/generative AI research mandate; DeepMind also acqui-hired 20+ Contextual AI researchers globally under an $80–90M deal.
research.growth_signal: Israel R&D headcount holds at ~2,000 across Tel Aviv and Haifa with no reported cuts; the TAU academic partnership expansion and DeepMind's continued Tel Aviv listing signal sustained investment in the site, while the Israel Innovation Authority projects 5–7% sector headcount growth for 2026.
research.fit_for_lior: Google TLV is a strong Creative AI fit — DeepMind's local presence ties directly to Gemini, Veo, and image-generation work, and the TAU partnership's GenAI evaluation and language-model research threads are natural entry points for a Product Analyst / Vibe Coder profile bridging AI research and product.
